title: Static client-side web preview (no backend/storage)
context: Educators and learners need a low-friction way to select and print sheets without running a CLI. A static, client-side web preview (no backend, no user accounts, no analytics that profile individuals) allows selection of script, template, and variant and triggers print/download. Any optional name-personalization feature must be in-memory only, never persisted or transmitted — this is a hard privacy constraint. The UI must be accessible (keyboard navigation, color contrast) and its SVG/PDF output must match CLI golden files.
objective: Build and deploy a static, client-side web preview that lets users select script, template, and accessibility variant, then print or download the resulting sheet — with no backend, no storage, no individual-profiling analytics, and accessible UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Static client-side application (no backend, no server-side storage) allows selection of: script, sheet template (trace/fade/copy/free-practice), accessibility variant, and paper size.
Print/download action produces the same SVG/PDF output as the CLI for identical inputs (verified against golden files).
Any optional name-personalization is in-memory only: never persisted to localStorage, cookies, or any remote endpoint; never logged.
UI is keyboard-accessible and meets color-contrast standards (WCAG 2.1 AA minimum).
No third-party analytics, tracking scripts, or resources that profile individual users.
Static build can be hosted on any static hosting (GitHub Pages, etc.) without a backend.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md section 5 (web preview — optional, M3+, client-side only, no backend/storage)
PLAN.md section 7E (privacy/PII — name field in-memory only, never persisted)
PLAN.md section 14 (security & privacy — no PII, no analytics that profile individuals)
output: A static client-side web preview application committed to the repo and deployable to static hosting — no backend, no PII — via PR with DCO sign-off.
